mapper.select:
SELECT o.id, o.orderDate, m.fileNumber as fileNumber, m.name as name, m.phoneNumber AS phoneNumber, o.orderType, o.orderStatus FROM t_order o LEFT JOIN t_member m ON o.member_id = m.id
m.name like concat('%',?,'%')
ORDER BY o.orderDate DESC
mapper.update:
update t_order
orderDate = #{orderDate},
orderType = #{orderType},
orderStatus = #{orderStatus},
where id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(id) FROM t_order WHERE orderDate = #{orderDate}
SELECT COUNT(id) FROM t_order WHERE orderDate >= #{orderDate}
select count(id) from t_order where orderDate = #{orderDate} and orderStatus = '已到诊'
select count(id) from t_order where orderDate >= #{orderDate} and orderStatus = '已到诊'

select s.name,count(o.id) setmeal_count, count(o.id)/(select count(id) from t_order) proportion from t_order o, t_setmeal s where o.setmeal_id = s.id group by o.setmeal_id order by setmeal_count desc limit 0,4;
